options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Choose the main goal.
complete_all_levels: All levels of the selected episodes
complete_boss_levels: Boss levels (E#M8) of selected episodes

options.name: difficulty
options.description:
Choose the game difficulty. These options match Heretic's skill levels.
wet nurse (Thou needeth a wet-nurse) - Fewer monsters and more items than medium. Damage taken is halved, and ammo pickups carry twice as much ammo. Any Quartz Flasks and Mystic Urns are automatically used when the player nears death.
easy (Yellowbellies-r-us) - Fewer monsters and more items than medium.
medium (Bringest them oneth) - Completely balanced, this is the standard difficulty level.
hard (Thou art a smite-meister) - More monsters and fewer items than medium.
black plague (Black plague possesses thee) - Same as hard, but monsters and their projectiles move much faster. Cheating is also disabled.

options.name: random_monsters
options.description:
Choose how monsters are randomized.
vanilla: No randomization
shuffle: Monsters are shuffled within the level
random_balanced: Monsters are completely randomized, but balanced based on existing ratio in the level. (Small monsters vs medium vs big)
random_chaotic: Monsters are completely randomized, but balanced based on existing ratio in the entire game.

options.name: random_pickups
options.description:
Choose how pickups are randomized.
vanilla: No randomization
shuffle: Pickups are shuffled within the level
random_balanced: Pickups are completely randomized, but balanced based on existing ratio in the level. (Small pickups vs Big)

options.name: random_music
options.description:
Level musics will be randomized.
vanilla: No randomization
shuffle_selected: Selected episodes' levels will be shuffled
shuffle_game: All the music will be shuffled

options.name: allow_death_logic
options.description:
Some locations require a timed puzzle that can only be tried once.
After which, if the player failed to get it, the location cannot be checked anymore.
By default, no progression items are placed here. There is a way, hovewer, to still get them:
Get killed in the current map. The map will reset, you can now attempt the puzzle again.

options.name: pro
options.description:
Include difficult tricks into rules. Mostly employed by speed runners.
i.e.: Leaps across to a locked area, trigger a switch behind a window at the right angle, etc.

options.name: check_sanity
options.description:
Include redundant checks. This increase total check count for the game.
i.e.: In a room, there might be 3 checks close to each other. By default, two of them will be remove.
This was done to lower the total count check for Heretic, as it is quite high compared to other games.
Check Sanity restores original checks.

options.name: start_with_map_scrolls
options.description: Give the player all Map Scroll items from the start.

options.name: reset_level_on_death
options.description:
When dying, levels are reset and monsters respawned. But inventory and checks are kept.
Turning this setting off is considered easy mode. Good for new players that don't know the levels well.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: episode1
options.description:
City of the Damned.
If none of the episodes are chosen, Episode 1 will be chosen by default.

options.name: episode2
options.description:
Hell's Maw.
If none of the episodes are chosen, Episode 1 will be chosen by default.

options.name: episode3
options.description:
The Dome of D'Sparil.
If none of the episodes are chosen, Episode 1 will be chosen by default.

options.name: episode4
options.description:
The Ossuary.
If none of the episodes are chosen, Episode 1 will be chosen by default.

options.name: episode5
options.description:
The Stagnant Demesne.
If none of the episodes are chosen, Episode 1 will be chosen by default.

options.name: split_bag_of_holding
options.description: Split the Bag of Holding into six individual items, each one increasing ammo capacity for one type of weapon only.

options.name: bag_of_holding_count
options.description:
How many Bags of Holding will be available.
If Split Bag of Holding is set, this will be the number of each capacity upgrade available.

options.name: max_ammo_crystals
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for crystals (Elven Wand ammo).

options.name: max_ammo_arrows
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for arrows (Ethereal Crossbow ammo).

options.name: max_ammo_claw_orbs
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for claw orbs (Dragon Claw ammo).

options.name: max_ammo_runes
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for runes (Hellstaff ammo).

options.name: max_ammo_flame_orbs
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for flame orbs (Phoenix Rod ammo).

options.name: max_ammo_spheres
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for spheres (Firemace ammo).

options.name: added_ammo_crystals
options.description: Set the amount of crystal capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: added_ammo_arrows
options.description: Set the amount of arrow capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: added_ammo_claw_orbs
options.description: Set the amount of claw orb capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: added_ammo_runes
options.description: Set the amount of rune capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: added_ammo_flame_orbs
options.description: Set the amount of flame orb capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: added_ammo_spheres
options.description: Set the amount of sphere capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
